name: /measure-rubric --format markdown emits the action-card verdict surface PRUNE KEEP TIGHTEN WIDEN per F-2
command: git init -q repo && cd repo && git -c user.email=x@y -c user.name=x commit --allow-empty -q -m c1 && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/measure-rubric.sh" --n 1 --format markdown >out.md 2>/dev/null && grep -q 'PRUNE' out.md && grep -q 'KEEP' out.md && grep -q 'TIGHTEN' out.md && grep -q 'WIDEN' out.md && echo verdict 1>&2
